name: Apple-Pear Chutney
recipeIngredient: 10 large Apples, tart; peeled, cored & coarsely chopped
5 Pears, green firm; peeled, cored & coarsely chopped
2 large Bell peppers, red; cleaned & coarsely chopped
1/2 cup Ginger, fresh; peeled & finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, nonreactive pot, bring vinegar and brown sugar to a boil over high heat.
2. Add all other ingredients and turn the heat to a simmer.
3. Cook, stirring occasionally, until thickened, about 45 minutes.
4. Pour into sterilized jars and seal.
